instructions.name: confirm_scam
docs: Admin confirms scam → accuracy tracking.

accounts.name: sentinel_treasury
docs: Treasury receives escrowed stakes

instructions.name: confirm_scam_program
docs: Admin confirms a program is a scam → accuracy tracking.

accounts.name: authority_reputation
docs: Optional: the authority's WalletReputation PDA

instructions.name: emergency_pause
docs: Emergency pause/unpause the system (admin only).

instructions.name: ensemble_score
docs: Get ensemble risk score combining wallet + program + token analysis.

accounts.name: wallet_reputation
docs: Wallet reputation — REQUIRED, PDA-verified

accounts.name: program_reputation
docs: Optional: program reputation PDA — verified via seeds

accounts.name: mint_analysis
docs: Optional: token mint analysis PDA — verified via seeds

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize the Sentinel model and treasury.

instructions.name: migrate_model
docs: Migrate/reallocate model account to correct size after struct changes (admin only).

accounts.name: sentinel_model
docs: Cannot use AccountLoader because the account may have old layout.

instructions.name: predict
docs: Predict fraud risk using 16 verified on-chain features.

instructions.name: remove_blacklist_entry
docs: Remove a blacklist entry (admin only).

instructions.name: report_scam
docs: Report a scam (requires staking).

instructions.name: report_scam_program
docs: Report a program as malicious (requires staking).

instructions.name: reset_accuracy
docs: Reset accuracy counters (admin only) — for fresh measurement after retraining.

instructions.name: resolve_program_report
docs: Resolve program report by vote.

accounts.name: sentinel_treasury
docs: SECURITY FIX: Treasury receives escrowed stakes instead of admin

instructions.name: resolve_report
docs: Resolve report by vote → false-positive correction if dismissed.

accounts.name: sentinel_treasury
docs: SECURITY FIX: Treasury receives escrowed stakes instead of admin

instructions.name: reward_program_reporter
docs: Reward a reporter whose program scam report was confirmed (admin only).

accounts.name: admin
docs: The admin who authorizes the reward

accounts.name: reporter
docs: The reporter who submitted the confirmed scam report

accounts.name: blacklist_entry
docs: The confirmed blacklist entry

instructions.name: reward_reporter
docs: Reward a reporter whose scam report was confirmed (admin only).

accounts.name: admin
docs: The admin who authorizes the reward

accounts.name: reporter
docs: The reporter who submitted the confirmed scam report

accounts.name: blacklist_entry
docs: The confirmed blacklist entry

instructions.name: rollback_program_weights
docs: Rollback program weights to last snapshot (admin anti-poisoning).

instructions.name: rollback_token_weights
docs: Rollback token weights to last snapshot (admin anti-poisoning).

instructions.name: rollback_weights
docs: Rollback weights to last snapshot (admin anti-poisoning).

instructions.name: scan_program
docs: Scan a Solana program/dApp for malicious signals.

accounts.name: target_program
docs: The program to scan (must be executable)

accounts.name: program_data
docs: The program's data account (BPF Loader Upgradeable ProgramData)

accounts.name: authority_reputation
docs: Optional: the authority's WalletReputation PDA (if exists)

instructions.name: scan_token_mint
docs: Scan a token mint for honeypot signals (mint/freeze authority, supply).

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint account to analyze

instructions.name: scan_tokens
docs: Scan token accounts for drainer/infection signals.
Pass token accounts as remaining_accounts.

instructions.name: set_fees
docs: Update scan fees (admin only).

instructions.name: snapshot_program_weights
docs: Save program weight snapshot (admin anti-poisoning).

instructions.name: snapshot_token_weights
docs: Save token weight snapshot (admin anti-poisoning).

instructions.name: snapshot_weights
docs: Save weight snapshot (admin anti-poisoning).

instructions.name: update_weights
docs: Upload neural network weights in chunks (admin only).

instructions.name: vote_on_program_report
docs: Vote on a program scam report (stake SOL).

instructions.name: vote_on_report
docs: Vote on a scam report (stake SOL).

instructions.name: withdraw_treasury
docs: Withdraw treasury fees (admin only).

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: only the admin can perform this action

errors.name: ChunkOutOfBounds
errors.msg: Weight chunk exceeds array bounds (max index 1499)

errors.name: ChunkTooLarge
errors.msg: Weight chunk too large (max 250 values per transaction)

errors.name: ChunkEmpty
errors.msg: Weight chunk cannot be empty

errors.name: InvalidWeight
errors.msg: Weight value must be finite (no NaN or Infinity)

errors.name: ProofTooLong
errors.msg: Proof string too long (max 256 characters)

errors.name: ProofEmpty
errors.msg: Proof string cannot be empty

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: ModelNotInitialized
errors.msg: Model weights not yet initialized

errors.name: NothingToWithdraw
errors.msg: No funds available to withdraw

errors.name: StakeTooLow
errors.msg: Stake amount below minimum required

errors.name: ReportAlreadyResolved
errors.msg: Report has already been resolved

errors.name: InsufficientVotes
errors.msg: Insufficient votes or stake to resolve

errors.name: NoSnapshot
errors.msg: No weight snapshot exists to rollback to

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: Invalid token account data

errors.name: NotAProgram
errors.msg: Target is not an executable program

errors.name: InvalidProgram
errors.msg: Invalid program data account

errors.name: ProgramModelNotInitialized
errors.msg: Program NN weights not yet initialized

errors.name: WrongLoaderOwner
errors.msg: Wrong BPF Loader owner

errors.name: ProgramDataMismatch
errors.msg: ProgramData address mismatch

errors.name: ProgramDataTooSmall
errors.msg: ProgramData too small

errors.name: ProgramPaused
errors.msg: Program is paused — emergency stop active

errors.name: RateLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Rate limit exceeded — too many scans per epoch

errors.name: InvalidFee
errors.msg: Fee value out of allowed range (0.0001 SOL to 1 SOL)

errors.name: StakeTooHigh
errors.msg: Stake amount exceeds maximum allowed per vote

errors.name: LowConfidenceScore
errors.msg: Low confidence: missing reputation PDAs for ensemble scoring

types.name: BlacklistEntry
docs: Blacklist entry with staking. PDA seeds: ["blacklist", flagged_wallet]

fields.name: status
docs: 0=pending, 1=confirmed, 2=dismissed

fields.name: predicted_score
docs: Risk score at time of report

types.name: ProgramBlacklistEntry
docs: Blacklist entry for programs. PDA seeds: ["prog_blacklist", flagged_program]

types.name: ProgramReputation
docs: On-chain reputation profile for a Solana program.
PDA seeds: ["program_rep", program_id]

fields.name: has_upgrade_authority
docs: Program can be rugged (upgrade authority exists)

fields.name: authority_is_flagged
docs: Deployer/authority wallet is flagged in Aegiz

fields.name: program_data_len
docs: Size of deployed program binary (bytes)

fields.name: risk_score
docs: Last computed risk score (0-100)

fields.name: risk_history
docs: Last 5 risk scores for trend detection

fields.name: high_risk_streak
docs: Consecutive high-risk scans (>80)

fields.name: auto_escalated
docs: Auto-escalated flag

fields.name: program_balance
docs: Program account SOL balance (lamports)

fields.name: deployer_program_count
docs: Number of programs deployed by this authority

fields.name: deployer_drain_count
docs: Number of drain events on deployer's wallet

fields.name: deployer_token_infections
docs: Number of token infections on deployer's wallet

types.name: ScamVote
docs: Vote PDA. Seeds: ["vote", blacklist_entry, voter]

types.name: SentinelModel
docs: The brain of Aegiz — 2-layer neural network with training metadata.
PDA seeds: ["model_weights"]

fields.name: learning_rate
docs: Base learning rate (adaptive: lr / sqrt(version))

fields.name: correct_predictions
docs: Correct predictions after confirm/dismiss

fields.name: total_evaluated
docs: Total evaluated (confirmed + dismissed)

fields.name: rolling_correct
docs: Rolling accuracy: last 100 predictions (correct/total)

fields.name: total_training_events
docs: Total training events (SGD steps performed)

fields.name: weights
docs: Neural network weights — see layout constants
V5+ state stored in reserved regions:
weights[1280] = paused flag (0.0 = running, 1.0 = paused)
weights[1281] = scan_rate_limit (as f32, 0 = unlimited)
weights[1282] = negative_samples_trained count

types.name: SentinelTreasury
docs: Treasury PDA. Seeds: ["sentinel_treasury"]

fields.name: prediction_fee
docs: Fee charged for predict() scans (lamports, default: 1_000_000 = 0.001 SOL)

fields.name: scan_program_fee
docs: Fee charged for scan_program() scans (lamports, default: 1_000_000 = 0.001 SOL)

fields.name: ensemble_fee
docs: Fee charged for ensemble_score() premium scans (lamports, default: 2_000_000 = 0.002 SOL)

fields.name: scan_token_fee
docs: Fee charged for scan_token_mint() scans (lamports, default: 1_000_000 = 0.001 SOL)

types.name: TokenMintAnalysis
docs: On-chain analysis of a token mint for honeypot/rug signals.
PDA seeds: ["mint_analysis", mint_pubkey]

fields.name: has_mint_authority
docs: Mint authority still active (can inflate supply)

fields.name: has_freeze_authority
docs: Freeze authority active (can freeze your tokens)

fields.name: same_authority
docs: Mint authority == freeze authority (common scam pattern)

fields.name: authority_is_multisig
docs: Is the authority a known multisig? (safer)

fields.name: supply
docs: Total supply (raw, before decimals)

fields.name: decimals
docs: Token decimals

fields.name: risk_score
docs: Computed risk score (0-100)

types.name: WalletReputation
docs: On-chain behavioral profile for a wallet.
PDA seeds: ["reputation", wallet_pubkey]

fields.name: last_train_slot
docs: Rate-limiting: slot of last training update

fields.name: last_known_balance
docs: Balance at last prediction (for drain detection)

fields.name: min_balance_seen
docs: Lowest balance ever seen

fields.name: max_balance_seen
docs: Highest balance ever seen

fields.name: drain_count
docs: Count of times balance dropped >50% between predictions

fields.name: token_infection_count
docs: Count of delegated/infected token accounts found by scan_tokens

fields.name: risk_history
docs: Last 5 risk scores for trend detection (circular buffer)

fields.name: risk_history_idx
docs: Index into risk_history circular buffer

fields.name: high_risk_streak
docs: Count of consecutive high-risk predictions (>80)

fields.name: deployer_program_count
docs: Number of programs this wallet has deployed (deployer tracking)

fields.name: auto_escalated
docs: Auto-escalated flag (set when streak >= 3)
